creator: byronkatz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #4)
No.  I didn't.  But it's not clear that is what I am supposed to do.

The line you reference is a command in a Makefile.  It's going to be run.  I don't see anything that a user is supposed to do differently, following typical conventions, to make this port build properly.  As far as I can tell, I'm going down the middle of the road and it's just not working.
